category_sources: Official homepage describes Vite+ as managing runtime, package manager, and frontend stack with one tool.
source_facts.description says vite-plus is a unified toolchain and entry point for web development.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use Vite+ branding.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Guide navigation entry on viteplus.dev.
source_facts.homepage identifies viteplus.dev as the official site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/voidzero-dev/vite-plus, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes Vite+, Vite, package-manager/runtime management, dev, check, test, build, and pack workflows.
source_facts.description identifies a unified web development toolchain.
